app.rdg: 1.Stab tih卯lh Lapelitas?
1. stab ti蕯i涩 Lapelitas.
1. What is penitence蕯
Tih卯lh Lapelitas dcho Sakrema ohoyud whe gwalh kretia tskwadad.
ti蕯i涩 Lapelitas d蓹c虒'u蕯 Sakrema 蕯uhuyud x史i蕯 g史蓹涩 kretia d岫簧檏始史adad.
1. Penitence is a sacrament that makes null the sin of a Christian.
2. Stab tihilh rarasmilalam?
2. stab ti蕯i涩 x虒ax虒a sbil始蕯alla蕯蓹b.
2. What is confession蕯
Abil gwat kretia ohaidhuthu ku leple aku boku tskwadads dahu hoyils whe ku tskwadads, gula dilh rarasmilalam.
蕯蓹bil始 g史at kretia 蕯uhaydx史tx史 k史i leple 蕯蓹 k史i b蓹k始史 d岫簧檏始史adads d蓹x史huyils x史i蕯 k史i d岫簧檏始史adads, g史蓹l di涩 x虒ax虒a sbil始蕯alla蕯蓹b.
When a Christian makes known to the priest all of his sins in order to make null his sin, that is holy confession.
3. Asared kwi tla ad'skwebitsut dhual ku rarasmilalam?
3. 蕯蓹s蕯蓹x虒id k史i 涩adsq史ibcut dx史蕯al k史i x虒ax虒a sbil始蕯alla蕯蓹b.
3. How do you prepare yourself for the holy confession?
Zihu kwi tla dstehech dhual di Sherk-Siam, tlhdahu kwawhats, lakrahu ched tla eidhu, ched tla reched ku dtskwadad;
d岫籭x史 k史i 涩udstihic虒 dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab, t涩dx史 k史ax史ac, ??? c虒蓹d 涩u蕯蓹ydx史, c虒蓹d 涩ux虒蓹c虒蓹d k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad;
First you pray unto God, truly to take ??? I will make known, I will think about my sin;
al slewhatlels ched tla dhu stsotab al ku drech:
蕯al s涩ix史a涩ils c虒蓹d 涩udx史scut蓹b 蕯al k史i dx虒蓹c虒:
telh halh kwi Sherk-Siam ra'tltobsh ti tsa,
t蓹涩 ha蕯涩 k史i s虒蓹q si蕯ab x虒虒a茮'tubs虒 ti 蕯蓹ca,
truly good is my desire toward God
whe la ra'tlthu kwi gwa desor dohugwad;
x史i蕯 l蓹x虒虒a茮'tx史 k史i _gwad蓹sor_??? d蓹x史蕯ug史ad;
tor ched tu whobed ku sgwas schelhrechems, tu hoyilched sa, asaredched awa.
tux虒史 c虒蓹d tux虒史ub蓹d k史i sg史a蕯s sc虒蓹涩x虒蓹c虒蓹bs, tuhuyilc虒蓹d sa蕯, 蕯蓹s蕯蓹x虒idc虒蓹d 蕯蓹w始蓹.
Al sbosatlils ched tla rab dhual ku dsgwa dtskwadad,
蕯al sbuusa涩ils c虒蓹d 涩ux虒aab dx史蕯al k史i dsg史a蕯 d胜蓹k始史adad,
On the fourth time I will cry because of my own sin.
ched tla s'tewielh aku gwalh soshababdhu siayus s'tewielh.
c虒蓹d 涩ust始iwi涩 蕯蓹 k史i g史蓹涩 s蕯us虒蓹babd蓹x史 syayus s't蓹wi蓹涩.
I will pray with a prayer for the workings of pity.
Al stselatsatlils ched tla tehech dhual di Sherk-Siam tsahu milalam aku tsoku.
蕯al sc蓹laca涩ils c虒蓹d 涩utihic虒 dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab 蕯蓹ca蓹x史 bil始蕯alla蕯蓹b 蕯蓹 k史i c蓹k史.
On the fifth time I will pray unto God for confession to be straight.
4. Aschal kwi tla adsiayus aku tsoku dhual ku rarasmilalam?
4. 蕯蓹sc虒al k史i 涩uadsyayus 蕯蓹 k史i c蓹k史 dx史蕯al k史i x虒ax虒a sbil始蕯alla蕯蓹b.
4. How will you work correctly for your holy confession?
Zihi kwi tlo dsrwelch chitebed aku leple; lakrahu ched tla p'tleltsob;
d岫籭x史 k史i 涩udsx虒蓹lc虒 c虒'铆tbid 蕯蓹 k史i leple; lakrahu_??? c虒蓹d 涩up虝蓹茮'ilc蓹b;
First I go aside and approach the priest; ??? I feel it
al slewhatlels ched tla gwagwadad aku astsut: o dgwe debad leple,
蕯al s涩ix史a涩ils c虒蓹d 涩ug史ag史adad 蕯蓹 k史i 蕯蓹scut: 蕯u d蓹g史i d蓹bad leple,
on the third time I will speak by saying: o father priest,
oshabits tsa, yare kra ta dtskwadad.
蕯us虒蓹bic 蕯蓹ca, y蓹x虒i x虒a蕯 t蓹 dd岫簧檏始史adad.
Have pity on me, for great is my sin.
Al sbosatlels ched tla 'tewielh aku gwalh rarasmilalam s'tewielh, dhual tih卯lh :
蕯al sbuusa涩ils c虒蓹d 涩ut'iwi涩 蕯蓹 k史i g史蓹涩 x虒ax虒a sbil始蕯alla蕯蓹b st'iwi涩, dx史蕯al ti蕯i涩 :
On the fourth time I will pray the prayer of confession, i.e.,
"Kra tu dtskwadad ate disduhspet锚degwasseb, ate disduhsgwadgwad ate disduhsiayus eba te wheladisduhsiayus."
"x虒a蕯 t蓹 dd岫簧檏始史adad 蕯蓹 t蓹 dsd蓹x史sp蓹tidg史as蓹b, 蕯蓹 t蓹 dsd蓹x史sg史adg史ad 蕯蓹 t蓹 dsd蓹x史syayus 蕯ib蓹 t蓹 x史i蕯l蓹dsyayus."
Al stselatsatlels ched tla haidhuthu ku leple aku des hagwahu whe tla milalam.
蕯al c蓹laca涩ils c虒蓹d 涩uhaydx史tx史 k史i leple 蕯蓹 k史i dshag史蓹x史 x史i蕯 涩ubil始蕯alla蕯蓹b.
On the fifth time I will make known to the priest how long I have not confessed (???).
Al sielatsatlels ched tla haidhuthu ku leple aku tus hoyuds whe ku dtskwadad.
蕯al sy蓹la蕯ca涩ils c虒蓹d 涩uhaydx史tx史 k史i l蓹pl蓹 蕯蓹 k史i tushuyuds x史i蕯 k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad.
On the sixth time I will make known to the priest how I will eliminate my sin.
Al stsoksatlels ched tla haidhuthu ku leple aku tu dskrpaleku.
蕯al c虝u蕯k史sa涩ils c虒蓹d 涩uhaydx史tx史 k史i l蓹pl蓹 蕯蓹 k史i tudsq蓹palik史.
On the seventh time I will make known to the priest my folly.
Al stkracheatlels ched tla haidhuthu leple aku tus balets ku dtskwadad,
蕯al stqac虒i蕯a涩ils c虒蓹d 涩uhaydx史tx史 l蓹pl蓹 蕯蓹 k史i tubalyic k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad,
On the eighth time I will make known to the priest the forgetting of my sin (??).
hoi ched tla reched ku tlewo't dtskwadad.
huy c虒蓹d 涩ux虒蓹c虒蓹d k史i 涩u????? dd岫簧檏始史adad.
5. Tla asared kwi tla adsrached ku adtskwadad dhual leple?
5. 涩u蕯蓹s蕯蓹x虒id k史i 涩(u)adss虒ac虒蓹d k史i add岫簧檏始史adad dx史蕯al leple.
Zihu kwi tlo dselid ku dtskwadad, ched tla reched, lakrahu ched tla haidhuthu ku leple dhual tih卯lh segwils ku dtskwadad,
d岫籭x史 k史i 涩uds蕯ilid k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad, c虒蓹d 涩ux虒蓹c虒蓹d, lakrahu_??? c虒蓹d 涩uhaydx史tx史 k史i leple dx史蕯al tih^i涩_ s蓹gwils_ k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad,
'tlalba asista dhual tih卯lh sbibadels ku dtskwadad.
'tlalba_ asista_ dx史蕯al ti蕯i涩 sbibad蓹ls_ k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad.
Whe kwi tlo desyetseb aku pa'tla'tl aku boku stab kra;
x史i蕯 k史i 涩udsy蓹c蓹b 蕯蓹 k史i p始a茮始a茮始 蕯蓹 k史i b蓹k始史 stab x虒a蕯;
I will not speak in vain of any thing ???
gula whe kwi tlo desyetseb gwalh lale tskwadad.
g史蓹l x史i蕯 k史i 涩udsy蓹c蓹b g史蓹涩 l蓹li蕯 d岫簧檏始史adad.
and I will not talk about others' sins.
6. Abil tlo hoyahu kwi tla adsrached ku adstskwadad,
6. 蕯蓹bil始 涩uhuy蓹x史 k史i 涩(u)adsx虒蓹c虒蓹d k史i adsd岫簧檏始史adad,
gula aschal kwi tlo adsgwagwadad ?
g史蓹l 蕯蓹sc虒al k史i 涩(u)adsg史ag史adad?
Abil tlo hoyahu ku tlo desrached ku dtskwadad,
abil始 涩uhuy蓹x史 k史i 涩(u)dsx虒蓹c虒蓹d k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad,
ched tla gwagwadad aku astsut:
c虒蓹d 涩(u)g史ag史adad 蕯蓹 k史i 蕯蓹scut :
I will speak by saying this:
dilh sbokrwels hahu ta aslarduhched dtskwadad,
di涩 sb史ks虒w蓹ls_ hahu_ ta_ aslas虒duhc虒蓹d dsd岫簧檏始史史adad,
ched atleba whobed kwa aswhalhched saidhu dtskwadad ;
c虒蓹d atl蓹ba_ wh史b蓹d_ kwa_ aswha涩c虒蓹d saidhu_ dsd岫簧檏始史adad ;
halh kwi gwa adsoshabits dgwe Sherk-Siam,
ha蕯涩 k史i g史ads蕯us虒abic d蓹g史i s虒蓹q si蕯ab,
it would be good if you, God, were to pity me,
eba dgwe debad leple halh kwi gwa adsoshabits,
蕯ib蓹 d蓹g史i蕯 dbad leple ha蕯涩 k史i g史ads蕯us虒abic,
or if you, father priest, were to pity me,
chahu tla haidhutobsh, asared kwi tlo dskrpaleku;
c虒蓹x史 涩uhaydx史tubs虒, 蕯蓹s蕯蓹x虒id k史i 涩udsq蓹palik史;
'tlob chahu ohoyud whe ku dtskawdad, abil as astsut ku adrechbits.
茮始ub c虒蓹x史 蕯uhuyud x史i蕯 k史i dd岫籯awdad, abil始 as_ astsut_ k史i adx虒蓹c虒bic.
it would be good if you were to make null my sin, ???????
Lakrahu ched tla orthu tih卯lh : "ate dsgwa askrop drech."
lakra hu_ c虒蓹d tla_ 史s虒thu_ ti蕯i涩 茮始_ "at蓹_ dsg史a蕯 asks虒史p_ dx虒蓹c虒."
Hoi chida tla astlabot aku tsoku,
huy c虒蓹da tla_ astlab史t_ 蕯蓹 k史i cuk史,
tlo abietebad aku leple aku dsahukrpaleku,
涩u蕯abyit蓹bad 蕯蓹 k史i leple 蕯蓹 k史i ds蓹x史q蓹palik史,
ched tla dgwad al ta drech ku gwalh leple tlus dhudgwets,
c虒蓹d 涩udg史ad 蕯al t蓹 dx虒蓹c虒 k史i g史蓹涩 leple 涩usdx史hud蓹g史ic,
abie tlo hoyahu ku tlo dsdhudgwetob aku leple,
abi蓹_ 涩uhuyah蓹x史 k史i 涩udsdhud蓹g史it蓹b 蕯蓹 k史i l蓹pl蓹 ,
ched tla rabthu ti drech, ched tla elid ku gwalh soshababdhu siayus s'tewielh.
c虒蓹d 涩ux虒aabtx史 ti dx虒蓹c虒, c虒蓹d 涩u蕯ilid k史i g史蓹涩 s蕯us虒蓹babdx史 syayus st始iwi涩.
Lakrahu ched tla welekr dhual leple, gwa ohoyud as whe ku dtskwadad.
_ laks虒ahu_ c虒蓹d 涩uwiliq始史 dx史蕯al leple, g史蓹蕯uhuyud蓹s x史i蕯 k史i dd岫簧檏始史adad.
7. Abil leple tlo tsotbitsid ohoyahu chahu, chahu tlo aredahu?
7. 蕯蓹bil始 leple 涩ucut蓹bicid 蕯uhuy蓹x史 c虒蓹x史, c虒蓹x史 涩u蕯蓹x虒id蓹x史蕯
Abil leple tlo tsotbsh ohoyahu chahu, ched tla or,
蕯蓹bil始 l蓹pl蓹 涩ucut蓹bs虒 蕯uhuy蓹x史 c虒蓹x史, c虒蓹d 涩u蕯ux虒史,
ched tla gwagwadad aku masi dhual ku Sherk-Siam,
c虒蓹d 涩ug史ag史adad 蕯蓹 k史i masi dx史蕯al k史i s虒蓹q si蕯ab,
I will speak of mercy to God
ched tla 'tehech dhual di Sherk-Siam,
c虒蓹d 涩utihic虒 dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab,
tlhtsahu kwerkrwel, hoi ched tla hoyud tsoku ku tu dskrpalekutob aku leple.
t涩 蕯蓹ca蓹x史 q史iq始史il, huy c虒蓹d 涩uhuyud c蓹k史 k史i tudsq蓹palik史tub 蕯蓹 k史i leple.
Aku tlo dspet锚degwasseb dhual di Sherk-Siam,
蕯蓹 k史i 涩udsp蓹tidg史as蓹b dx史蕯al di蕯 s虒蓹q si蕯ab,
gula whe la halh kwi gwa dsbahatsut.
g史蓹l x史i蕯 l蓹ha蕯涩 k史i g史蓹 dsbahatcut.
